case_title: YIP HOLDINGS TWO LLC et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YIP HOLDINGS TWO LLC LO, FONG AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP HOLDINGS TWO LLC LO, FONG AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED. PERSON APPEARING IS FONG LO (MANAGER).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-05-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGURED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHITBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YIP HOLDINGS TWO LLC LO, FONG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
